data.body: I went ahead and cleaned his kitchen and started his laundry. I was mopping his kitchen floor when he woke up. He got ready and we drove to his brother's house. As we were pulling in the driveway his uncle was walking out of the front door. His uncle and I used to work together so he knows me.
data.author: did:plc:6sn5ipsdnbalrtkjgpjkr3u7

data.body: Except me and his family. I told him and it clicked in his uncle's head. He asked me if I was related to my uncle, I was like, yeah that's my family. Their uncle turned to them and said, "oh shit boys, if your dad had hit one of his relatives, he would be under the jail and not in it."
data.author: did:plc:6sn5ipsdnbalrtkjgpjkr3u7

data.body: We drank that bottle of grey goose straight from the bottle, no cups, no glasses, just five guys passing a bottle and sipping. Gulping in my bf's case. We talked and talked and talked until the sun rose. At the end, his uncle told me, "I'm going to tell his grandmother, everything is well..."
data.author: did:plc:6sn5ipsdnbalrtkjgpjkr3u7
